title: Towards levelling up the EIP-AGRI – a common framework for multilevel functional capacity development
description: A policy brief proposing a Common Framework for Multi-level Capacity Development (CF4CD) to address innovation capacity gaps within the European Innovation Partnership for Agricultural Productivity and Sustainability (EIP-AGRI). It outlines five principles, capacity levels, and support mechanisms aimed at levelling up functional capacities across EU Member States and actors.
